title: Goety Compat With Xaero's Minimap
description: This pack makes the Goety mod fully compatible with Xaero's Worldmap and Minimap!
body:
## What does this do?
This Resource pack adds the icons that arent immedialty included when using Xaero's Minimap, for example, adding icons for Wraiths and things like Redstone Golems

Link to [Goety](https://modrinth.com/mod/goety)

Link to [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)

Very usefull when playing in modpacks that include mods like alex's mobs becuase they probably have the [Icon Xaeros](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icon-xaeros) resource pack installed which adds icons to those type of mods, but not Goety.
